pharma.title: Alzheimer's Lormalzi therapy offers hope; doctors for early diagnosis, close monitoring
pharma.summary: Unlike conventional Alzheimer's drugs that largely manage memory loss and behavioural symptoms, donanemab targets amyloid-beta plaques ' abnormal protein deposits linked to the disease.
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: Athena Behavioral Health opens Northeast’s largest integrated psychiatric hospital in Guwahati
pharma.summary: The new facility expands Athena’s network to five hospitals and aims to address rising mental health and addiction disorders in Assam, where nearly one in 12 people experience mental health morbidity.
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: UAE becomes third country globally to approve MIEBO, an innovative treatment for dry eye disease
pharma.summary: MIEBO, which contains the active substance ‘perfluorohexyloctane’, is the first prescription eye drop that directly targets tear evaporation
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: IHC reinforces industrial leadership at “Make it in the Emirates 2026” with AED 40bln in strategic agreements
pharma.summary: The IHC Pavilion drew close to 100,000 visitors, hosted over 40 sessions featuring 70 speakers across four days of industry dialogue and engagement
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: OIC and SFDA launch global awareness campaign for medication safety during Hajj
pharma.summary: This initiative represents a unified effort across 57 OIC Member States to prioritize medication safety and public health
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

providers.title: Action Energy Company secures KWD 40.9mln in credit facilities to support contracted rig expansion
providers.summary: The facilities support the financing and deployment of new rigs linked to contract awards previously announced with Kuwait Oil Company
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: InvestGB launches the fourth edition of the IGB Internship Program
providers.summary: Aims to empower Kuwaiti youth and develop national talent
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

diagnostics.title: WCM-Q workshop boosts understanding of evidence-based healthcare
diagnostics.summary: Providing participants with foundational skills and knowledge of core epidemiology and biostatistics concepts used in research
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.

healthtech.title: QF’s QSTP launches $30mln Tech Venture Fund, names first co-investment partners
healthtech.summary: Qatar Science & Technology Park unveils its $30 million Tech Venture Fund and inaugural cohort of co-investment partners
